creator: kseniia.journey-london-rexby
caption:
UK travel tip I wish I knew sooner 🇬🇧✨

Trip.com is a one-stop travel platform where you can easily compare and book train tickets, flights and hotels all in one app 🚆

For example, a trip from London Euston Station to Manchester Piccadilly Station originally costs around￡40. With Split Tickets, you can save an average of 19%, plus an additional 1/3 discount with a Railcard (*Purchase a train ticket to activate it) 🎟️

️ Then, by using code KSENIIA20%, you can get an extra *5% off (*2% off for existing users). Now it only costs around ￡25, and the coupon pack is valid long-term🎁

 You can also get *20% off Railcards when purchasing a Railcard on Trip.com with code KSENIIA20% (*10% off existing users) 📲

 Make sure to download Trip.com app, don’t miss out @trip.com_train

transcription.text: UK travel tip I wish I knew sooner Trip.com is a one-stop travel platform where you can easily compare and book train tickets, flights and hotels all in one app. For example, a trip from London Euston station to Manchester Piccadilly station originally costs around £40. With free tickets, you can save an average of 19% plus an additional one-third discount with a railcard and get an extra 5% off with this code. Now it only costs around £25 and the coupon pack is valid long-term. You can also get 20% off railcards with this code. Use code XENIAT20% to claim your coupon. Make sure to download Trip.com app. Don't miss out!
